item.title: F-002: Create File
item.intent: Users must be able to create new markdown files anywhere they have write access — no app-specific folders, no restrictions
item.description: Create new .md file via system file picker save dialog. LF line endings. Default filename Untitled.md. File immediately opened for editing after creation.
acceptanceCriteria: User creates a new .md file in any accessible location and begins writing immediately
New file uses LF line endings
Default filename is Untitled.md, user can rename in picker
User cancels save picker and returns to previous state with no side effects
Write failure (disk full, permissions) shows error with no corrupt or empty file left behind
Creating a file with an existing name at that location prompts for overwrite or rename
